THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. STRATEGIC HEALTHCARE SYSTEMS, INC. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Compel Pltf To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories General Set No. One, Form Interrogatories Set No. One, Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No Appearances on this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT STRATEGIC HEALTHCARE SYSTEMS INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories General Set No. One, Form Interrogatories Set No. One, Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One is Off calendar per the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Moiton To Compel Pltf To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories General Set No. One, Form Interrogatories Set No. One, Special Interrogatories, Set No. One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Continued To Jun-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT STRATEGIC HEALTHCARE SYSTEMS INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories General Set No. One, Form Interrogatories Set No. One, Special Interrogatories Set No. One And Request For Production Of Documents, Set No. One is continued to June 24, 2014 at 9:00 am to give Strategic Healthcare Systems, Inc. the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Strategic Healthcare Systems, Inc. must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 11, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF LUISA GUTIERREZ'S Motion For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff may file its proposed Second Amended Complaint within 10 days of entry of this order. The Court signed the proposed order submitted by email. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Continued To May-14-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
